title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Schneider Electric India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Schneider Electric India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Schneider Electric India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Bhubaneswar-based team.

About Schneider Electric India:
Schneider Electric India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Schneider Electric India!
